About the House

A Standard Beyond Ordinary

At House of DUKE Fashion, we believe true style is intentional. It is not assembled in haste. It is not estimated. It is not generic. It is measured, structured, and crafted with discipline.

"We do not merely produce garments.
We construct presence."

Every garment begins with understanding the individual — posture, proportion, movement, personality, and purpose. Nothing is accidental. True craftsmanship is deliberate.

Proportion & SilhouettePremium FabricsPrecision TailoringGlobal Reach
Read Our Full Story
What We Craft

Services for the Distinguished Man

Every garment is an individual commission, crafted with the same discipline from the grandest wedding regalia to the sharpest corporate suit.

01
👔
Bespoke Suits

Fully custom-cut suits from premium fabrics. Single or double-breasted, slim or classic — engineered entirely around your body and personality.

Start This Order →
02
🪡
Agbada & Senator

Traditional African regalia reimagined with contemporary elegance. Rich embroidery, luxurious fabrics, impeccable construction.

Start This Order →
03
💼
Corporate & Formal

Command every boardroom with tailored corporate wear — trousers, blazers, waistcoats, and three-piece sets built to impress.

Start This Order →
04
💒
Wedding Collections

From groom's attire to matching groomsmen collections. Coordinated, distinguished looks for your most important day.

Start This Order →
05
✨
Casual Luxury Wear

Elevated everyday wear — kaftan sets, casual trousers, polo shirts — maintaining the House of DUKE standard at all times.

Start This Order →
06
🧵
Alterations & Repairs

Expert alterations and restoration. We ensure a perfect fit — whether a new creation or a cherished piece revived to its finest.

Start This Order →
A Refined Process

From Consultation to Delivery

Our experience is carefully designed to be seamless, professional, and transparent. Clarity and discipline define every stage.

💬1
Measurement Consultation

Physical or virtual. We understand your posture, proportion, and purpose before any work begins.

🎨2
Style & Fabric Refinement

We collaborate on fabric, silhouette, and finishing. Every decision is intentional and aligned to you.

🤝3
Transparent Price Agreement

A structured, professional negotiation. Fair price — version-tracked, locked, and invoiced automatically.

⚙️4
Structured Production

A defined production timeline. You track every stage through your client dashboard in real time.

✅5
Quality Inspection & Delivery

Thorough quality inspection before delivery. Perfectly finished, pressed, and ready to be worn.

Pricing System

Professional Price Negotiation — Not Bargaining

Our platform features a structured, luxury-grade negotiation engine. Every offer is versioned, timestamped, and tracked. Final agreed prices are locked and invoiced automatically.

📋

Version-Tracked Offers

Every price proposal stored with full history — by whom, amount, timestamp.

🔒

Price Locking on Agreement

Status becomes "Fee Agreed" — price locked, no changes, invoice auto-generated.

⚖️

Minimum Price Protection

Threshold per garment protects quality. Below-threshold offers auto-declined professionally.

📄

Auto Invoice — 60/40 Deposit

Invoice generated on agreement: 60% deposit activates production, 40% before delivery.

Global Access

Luxury Should Not Be Restricted by Geography

While proudly based in Kaduna, our standards are not limited by location. We operate with a global perspective — combining refined structure with cultural awareness and modern elegance.

We support clients within Nigeria and abroad through virtual consultations, international communication channels, structured production scheduling, and global payment integration.
